vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the visual evidence. The pots are present, but the biological specimens are absent or non-viable.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Systemic Loss: White rabbit anchor is present, but the Pothos is absent.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.P3: White rabbit figurine remains, but the Pothos is entirely missing from the pot.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no signs of Silver Guest.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Soil appears dark and potentially damp, but lacks any vegetative cover.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no debris or fungal growth noted.
biome_observations.anomalies: The transition from T-3 to T-2 shows a total loss of visual data (blackout), followed by continued absence of plant life in the final frames.

vision_report.temporal_deltas: From EARLIEST to T-3, the pots were already devoid of visible foliage. From T-2 to CURRENT, the camera feed has failed or is obstructed, resulting in a total loss of visual monitoring capability.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. There are no living specimens to observe.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered plants across all frames, followed by the total loss of image signal in the final three frames.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic failure of the botanical biome. The registered plants (P1-P4) are not present in the provided imagery. The pots contain only soil and, in the case of P3, a stationary white rabbit figurine. The final sequence of images (T-2, T-1, CURRENT) provides no visual data, suggesting either a camera malfunction or a complete lack of illumination in the environment.
